title: Exotic Egyptian Lamb Wrap
description: A resinous and snappy Egyptian dish featuring hind shank, wrapped in leaves and steamed to perfection, perfect for a plant-based friendly meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced onion, minced garlic, ground coriander, and ground cumin.
Add the lamb hind shank to the bowl and coat with the onion mixture.
Wrap each lamb shank in a collard green leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the wrapped lamb shanks in a large steamer basket.
Steam the lamb shanks for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender and falls off the bone.
In a small bowl, mix together the lemon juice and olive oil.
Brush the lemon juice mixture over the lamb shanks during the last 30 minutes of steaming.
Serve the lamb shanks hot, wrapped in the collard green leaves.
